creator: filis@FreeBSD.org
text:
oddly, I cannot find libsndio in the list on freshports and the port itself, but `pkg info signal-desktop` returns libsndio.so.7.2 as a dependency. 
The sndio port was recently updated which results in libsndio.so.7.3 to be installed. 
I can't tell, where in the dependency list this should be fixed, symlinking the .so file fixes it for now on my end.
